## All (6) ((6 results))
- 1. Housing and Transportation Cost Index: Aggregate Dissemination Areas Table: 46-10-0091-01 Geography: Canada, Province or territory, Aggregate Dissemination Area Frequency: Occasional Description: A novel index for estimating the expense of housing and transportation in Canada has been developed, based on the Center for Neighborhood Technology’s Housing + Transportation (H+T®) ... Description: A novel index for estimating the expense of housing and transportation in Canada has been developed, based on the Center for Neighborhood Technology’s Housing + Transportation (H+T®) Affordability Index. By combining Census data and data from other statistical programs we obtain a composite index (the H+T Index) for all Aggregate Dissemination Areas of Canada, except for Territories and First Nations. This table uses the methodology of table 46100090, calculated on Aggregate Dissemination Areas. More Release date: 2025-06-06
- 2. Population and dwelling counts: Canada and aggregate dissemination areas Table: 98-10-0013-01 Geography: Canada, Province or territory, Aggregate Dissemination Area Frequency: Occasional Universe: All persons, 2021 and 2016 censuses – 100% data Variable list: Population and dwelling counts (7) Description: This table presents the 2021 and 2016 population counts and the 2021 dwelling counts, land area and population density for aggregate dissemination areas. It also shows the percentage ... Description: This table presents the 2021 and 2016 population counts and the 2021 dwelling counts, land area and population density for aggregate dissemination areas. It also shows the percentage change in the population counts between 2016 and 2021. More Release date: 2022-02-09
This table presents the 2021 and 2016 population counts and the 2021 dwelling counts, land area and population density for aggregate dissemination areas. It also shows the percentage ...
This table presents the 2021 and 2016 population counts and the 2021 dwelling counts, land area and population density for aggregate dissemination areas. It also shows the percentage change in the population counts between 2016 and 2021.
- 3. Population and dwelling counts: Canada, provinces and territories, and aggregate dissemination areas Table: 98-10-0013-02 Geography: Canada, Province or territory, Aggregate Dissemination Area Frequency: Occasional Universe: All persons, 2021 and 2016 censuses – 100% data Variable list: Population and dwelling counts (7) Description: This table presents the 2021 and 2016 population counts and the 2021 dwelling counts, land area and population density for aggregate dissemination areas by a selected province or ... Description: This table presents the 2021 and 2016 population counts and the 2021 dwelling counts, land area and population density for aggregate dissemination areas by a selected province or territory. It also shows the percentage change in the population counts between 2016 and 2021. More Release date: 2022-02-09
This table presents the 2021 and 2016 population counts and the 2021 dwelling counts, land area and population density for aggregate dissemination areas by a selected province or ...
This table presents the 2021 and 2016 population counts and the 2021 dwelling counts, land area and population density for aggregate dissemination areas by a selected province or territory. It also shows the percentage change in the population counts between 2016 and 2021.
- 4. Canada, provinces, territories, census divisions (CDs) and aggregate dissemination areas (ADAs), 2016 Census Table: 98-508-X2016001 Geography: Aggregate Dissemination Area Description: The Census Profile Standard Error Supplement provides the standard error for each long-form estimate along with the standard Census Profile data for a selected ADA, its corresponding ... Description: The Census Profile Standard Error Supplement provides the standard error for each long-form estimate along with the standard Census Profile data for a selected ADA, its corresponding census division (CD) and province/territory, as well as for Canada. It can be downloaded for selected areas or the entire profile in a variety of commonly used formats (e.g., CSV, TAB or IVT). This product will be updated with additional content released on November 29, 2017. More Release date: 2018-01-19
The Census Profile Standard Error Supplement provides the standard error for each long-form estimate along with the standard Census Profile data for a selected ADA, its corresponding ...
The Census Profile Standard Error Supplement provides the standard error for each long-form estimate along with the standard Census Profile data for a selected ADA, its corresponding census division (CD) and province/territory, as well as for Canada. It can be downloaded for selected areas or the entire profile in a variety of commonly used formats (e.g., CSV, TAB or IVT). This product will be updated with additional content released on November 29, 2017.
- 5. Census Profile, 2016 Profile of a community or region: 98-316-X2016001 Geography: Census subdivision, Federal electoral district, Canada, Province or territory, Census division, Designated place, Forward sortation area, Economic region, Census metropolitan area, Census agglomeration, Census metropolitan area part, Census agglomeration part, Census tract, Population centre, Dissemination area, Aggregate Dissemination Area, Health region, Local health integration network Description: This profile presents information from the 2016 Census of Population for various levels of geography, including provinces and territories, census metropolitan areas, communities and ... Description: This profile presents information from the 2016 Census of Population for various levels of geography, including provinces and territories, census metropolitan areas, communities and census tracts. Data are from the 2016 Census of Population and are available according to their release. February 8, 2017 – Population and dwelling counts; May 3, 2017 – Age and sex, Type of dwelling; August 2, 2017 – Families, households and marital status, Language; September 13, 2017 – Income; October 25, 2017 – Immigration and ethnocultural diversity, Housing, Aboriginal peoples; November 29, 2017 – Education, Labour, Journey to work, Language of work, Mobility and migration. More Release date: 2017-11-29
- 6. Population and dwelling counts Table: 98-402-X2016001 Geography: Federal electoral district, Canada, Province or territory, Census division, Census subdivision, Designated place, Economic region, Census metropolitan area, Census agglomeration, Census metropolitan area part, Census agglomeration part, Census tract, Population centre, Dissemination area, Aggregate Dissemination Area Description: These tables provide population and dwelling counts established by the 2016 Census of Population. The levels of geography covered are Canada, provinces and territories and other ... Description: These tables provide population and dwelling counts established by the 2016 Census of Population. The levels of geography covered are Canada, provinces and territories and other geographic areas, including census subdivisions (municipalities), census metropolitan areas and census agglomerations. For selected geographies, the tables provide percentage change in the population counts between 2016 and 2011. Data are also provided for land area and population density. Various tables provide sort capabilities that allow the data in a column to be sorted in descending or ascending order. Geographic boundaries are those in effect on January 1, 2016. More Release date: 2017-02-08
These tables provide population and dwelling counts established by the 2016 Census of Population. The levels of geography covered are Canada, provinces and territories and other ...
These tables provide population and dwelling counts established by the 2016 Census of Population. The levels of geography covered are Canada, provinces and territories and other geographic areas, including census subdivisions (municipalities), census metropolitan areas and census agglomerations.
For selected geographies, the tables provide percentage change in the population counts between 2016 and 2011. Data are also provided for land area and population density. Various tables provide sort capabilities that allow the data in a column to be sorted in descending or ascending order. Geographic boundaries are those in effect on January 1, 2016.

The Sort by feature provides four options:
- By date – sorts results by product release date starting with the most recent.
- By most popular – gives priority to results that are most frequently selected by users, followed by the most recent.
- By relevance is only needed or beneficial when you use the search box and submit a search query. Results are ordered by a combination of where the search term appears in the content, e.g., if it appears in the title, it likely means the product is more relevant to your search; how up to date or new the content in the product is; how popular the product is; and other factors.
- By title – sorts results alphabetically.
The Sort by feature provides three options:
- By date – sorts results by product release date starting with the most recent.
- By relevance is only needed or beneficial when you use the search box and submit a search query. Results are ordered by a combination of where the search term appears in the content, e.g., if it appears in the title, it likely means the product is more relevant to your search; how up to date or new the content in the product is; how popular the product is; and other factors.
- By title – sorts results alphabetically.
- You can initiate a search by entering keywords or selecting filters (e.g., under Subject, Geography , etc.) on the left side of the page.
You can initiate a search by entering keywords or selecting filters (e.g., under Subject, Geography , etc.) on the left side of the page.
- Filters can be used together or in any combination. Each time you select a filter, the results on the page are updated.
Filters can be used together or in any combination. Each time you select a filter, the results on the page are updated.
- To start a new search, click on the Clear all button above the search box or deselect each filter.
To start a new search, click on the Clear all button above the search box or deselect each filter.
- Specified keywords and filters appear above the search box. You can deselect any or all the tags to refine or clear your search.
Specified keywords and filters appear above the search box. You can deselect any or all the tags to refine or clear your search.
- You can enter keywords in the search box. It is not necessary to use “+” or “, “ or “AND”.
You can enter keywords in the search box. It is not necessary to use “+” or “, “ or “AND”.
- You can delete some or all of the keywords from your search string.
You can delete some or all of the keywords from your search string.
- Quotes around keywords limit the search to a specific phrase. For example, “labour force survey” will limit results to products containing this phrase.
Quotes around keywords limit the search to a specific phrase.
- For example, “labour force survey” will limit results to products containing this phrase.
For example, “labour force survey” will limit results to products containing this phrase.
- Use “or” between keywords to obtain results that contain one or more search terms. For example, labour or­ force or survey will limit results to products containing any or all of these words.
Use “or” between keywords to obtain results that contain one or more search terms.
- For example, labour or­ force or survey will limit results to products containing any or all of these words.

- This search looks for results that have your query term in the title, description, subject, geography, product number or other information about the product. For example, when searching the term ‘Diseases’, all results with the word ‘Diseases’ in the title, description or tagged the subject appear.
